{
  "judge_id": "Judge-123",

    "R1.5": "The agent proposed a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, reordering the original text to standard intro flow and tightening claims.",
    "R1.6": "The revised version reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register, no lost meaning, and improved clarity.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims, such as the assumption about prior work's pipelined vs. joint approach.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d), addressing all required dimensions.",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free and identifies no new errors or fabrications; it also improves the original text without introducing regressions.",

rationale.R1.5: The agent proposed a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale, reordering the original text to standard intro flow and tightening claims.
rationale.R1.6: The revised version reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register, no lost meaning, and improved clarity.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims, such as the assumption about prior work's pipelined vs. joint approach.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed active set J*(d), addressing all required dimensions.
rationale.RX.4: The output is harm-free and identifies no new errors or fabrications; it also improves the original text without introducing regressions.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear explanations for the revisions.
